title: artemisia indica var. kumaonensis
intro: Artemisia indica var. kumaonensis, also known as Himalayan wormwood, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which help to combat various health issues. The plant is known to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antihelmintic agent, helping to eliminate intestinal parasites. Herbal preparations of Artemisia indica var. kumaonensis include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
